items.title_en: KBW upgrades Toll, citing the K-shaped housing market favoring the 'affluent'
items.title_zh: KBW 上调 Toll 价格，理由是 K 形房地产市场有利于“富裕人士”
items.desc_en: The bank thinks Lennar and Toll brothers are heading in different directions due to the K-shaped economy.
items.desc_zh: 该银行认为，由于 K 型经济，Lennar 和 Toll 兄弟正走向不同的方向。

items.title_en: 51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查显示，51% 的美国成年人表示，美国梦目前对大多数人来说遥不可及
items.desc_en: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.
items.desc_zh: 在 CNBC 的一项独家调查中，81% 的受访者表示，生活成本是他们实现美国梦的最大财务障碍。

items.title_en: Tickets for Iran fans revoked, says federation
items.title_zh: 伊朗足协表示，伊朗球迷的门票已被吊销
items.desc_en: Iran's football federation says its allocation of tickets for the group stage of the World Cup has been revoked just days before the tournament.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗足协表示，就在比赛前几天，其世界杯小组赛门票的分配已被取消。

items.title_en: Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the cancer drugmaker for $10.6 billion
items.title_zh: 英国葛兰素史克 (GSK) 同意以 106 亿美元收购这家癌症制药商后，Nuvalent 股价飙升 39%
items.desc_en: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.
items.desc_zh: 这笔交易发生之际，正值生物技术交易狂潮之际，迫在眉睫的专利悬崖、新近活跃的公共市场以及制药商竞相加强管道建设。

items.title_en: Kenyan police fire tear gas at protest against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚警方发射催泪瓦斯抗议美国埃博拉检疫中心计划
items.desc_en: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title_en: Man accused of killing mother-in-law with poison-laced satay
items.title_zh: 男子被控用有毒沙爹杀害婆婆
items.desc_en: Indonesia police allege the man killed the woman as he felt disrespected by her.
items.desc_zh: 印度尼西亚警方称，该男子因感到不受尊重而杀害了该女子。

items.title_en: Trump’s grip on the GOP leaves Netanyahu with few places to turn - The Washington Post
items.title_zh: 特朗普对共和党的控制让内塔尼亚胡几乎无处可去——《华盛顿邮报》
items.desc_en: Trump’s grip on the GOP leaves Netanyahu with few places to turn  The Washington PostLive updates: Trump still confident of deal as Israel-Iran attacks expose rift with Netanyahu  CNNHow Israel is fru
items.desc_zh: 特朗普对共和党的控制让内塔尼亚胡几乎没有转机 《华盛顿邮报》实时更新：以色列和伊朗的袭击暴露了与内塔尼亚胡的裂痕，特朗普仍然对达成协议充满信心 CNN 以色列的现状如何

items.title_en: Some Maine Democrats are wavering on Graham Platner - Politico
items.title_zh: 一些缅因州民主党人对格雷厄姆·普拉特纳犹豫不决 - Politico
items.desc_en: Some Maine Democrats are wavering on Graham Platner  PoliticoOpinion | I know firsthand why Graham Platner shouldn’t be a U.S. senator  The Washington PostKhanna condemns Platner's past actions, but "
items.desc_zh: 一些缅因州民主党人对格雷厄姆·普拉特纳犹豫不决我直接知道为什么格雷厄姆·普拉特纳不应该成为美国参议员《华盛顿邮报》卡纳谴责普拉特纳过去的行为，但是“

items.title_en: India's growth story faces its toughest test yet in Modi’s third term
items.title_zh: 印度的增长故事面临莫迪第三任期以来最严峻的考验
items.desc_en: Prime Minister Narendra Modi faces his biggest test as India's appeal as the world's fastest-growing economy dims for global investors.
items.desc_zh: 作为全球增长最快的经济体，印度对全球投资者的吸引力正在减弱，总理纳伦德拉·莫迪面临着最大的考验。

items.title_en: Black bear caught in Japan after days of sightings
items.title_zh: 连续几天目击黑熊在日本被捕
items.desc_en: The capture in Utsunomiya comes as bear attacks have reached record levels across Japan.
items.desc_zh: 宇都宫的抓捕事件发生之际，日本各地的熊袭击事件已达到创纪录水平。

items.title_en: Pentagon expands list of China military-linked firms to include Alibaba, Baidu in fresh blow to diplomatic thaw
items.title_zh: 五角大楼扩大了与中国军事相关的公司名单，将阿里巴巴和百度纳入其中，对外交解冻造成新的打击
items.desc_en: The Pentagon briefly posted a similar expanded list in February, then withdrew it without explanation before Trump's China trip.
items.desc_zh: 五角大楼在二月份曾短暂发布过一份类似的扩大名单，但在特朗普访华之前又将其撤回，且没有任何解释。

items.title_en: The space race is coming for pharma: Why drug development is heading to lower Earth orbit
items.title_zh: 制药业的太空竞赛即将来临：为什么药物开发正走向近地轨道
items.desc_en: Companies see a commercial opportunity in creating new ways to administer drugs to patients – in space.
items.desc_zh: 公司看到了在太空中创造为患者用药的新方法的商业机会。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran deal could be reached in 'two or three days' and Strait of Hormuz will reopen 'immediately'
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗协议可能在“两三天”内达成，霍尔木兹海峡将“立即”重新开放
items.desc_en: Speaking to reporters after attending the NBA Finals in New York, Trump said the two parties are in the final stages of a "very, very good deal".
items.desc_zh: 特朗普在纽约参加NBA总决赛后对记者表示，两党正处于“非常非常好的协议”的最后阶段。

items.title_en: Hundreds of aftershocks jolt Philippines as officials say death toll could rise
items.title_zh: 菲律宾发生数百次余震，官员称死亡人数可能上升
items.desc_en: Dozens of people are dead and hundreds more injured following an earthquake in the country's south.
items.desc_zh: 该国南部发生地震，造成数十人死亡、数百人受伤。

items.title_en: ICC suspends top prosecutor after investigating misconduct allegations
items.title_zh: 国际刑事法院在调查不当行为指控后暂停了高级检察官的职务
items.desc_en: Karim Khan denies all allegations of sexual misconduct and his lawyers say he rejects the decision in the strongest terms.
items.desc_zh: 卡里姆·汗否认所有不当性行为的指控，他的律师表示，他以最强烈的措辞拒绝这一决定。

items.title_en: Xi Jinping and Kim Jong Un vow stronger ties as North Korea visit wraps up
items.title_zh: 习近平和金正恩誓言朝鲜访问结束后将加强关系
items.desc_en: Xi has wrapped up a two-day visit to Pyongyang, his first official trip to North Korea since 2019.
items.desc_zh: 习近平结束了对平壤为期两天的访问，这是他自 2019 年以来首次正式访问朝鲜。

items.title_zh: 美国袭击后阿曼附近油轮起火，24名印度船员全部获救
items.desc_en: Crew members of the unladen tanker had sent distress messages saying the vessel was on fire and sinking.
items.desc_zh: 这艘空载油轮的船员已发出求救信息，称该船着火并正在下沉。

items.title_zh: 特朗普成为第一位出席 NBA 总决赛的美国总统，在纽约遭到嘘声
items.desc_en: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.
items.desc_zh: 购票者在进入麦迪逊广场花园的场馆时要面临机场式的安检，随后引发了阵阵嘘声。

items.title_en: Trump loudly booed at Madison Square Garden before Knicks-Spurs NBA finals game
items.title_zh: NBA总决赛尼克斯队与马刺队比赛前，特朗普在麦迪逊广场花园大声嘘声
items.desc_en: Trump's decision to attend Game 3 of the NBA Final was controversial for Knicks fans, some of whom feared he would jinx what has been an epic playoff run.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普出席 NBA 总决赛第三场比赛的决定引起了尼克斯队球迷的争议，其中一些人担心他会给这场史诗般的季后赛之旅带来厄运。

items.desc_en: Trump Previews Fall Strategy With Baseless Claims of California Vote Fraud  The New York TimesCalifornia, and the dangerous sudden resurgence of GOP voter fraud fever  CNNTrump Fuels Election-Fraud Cl

items.title_en: Israel and Iran flare-up tests Trump's grip and could strengthen Tehran's negotiating hand
items.title_zh: 以色列和伊朗的冲突考验特朗普的控制力，并可能增强德黑兰的谈判手感
items.desc_en: The web of fractious alliances and dysfunctional ceasefires shows how destabilised the region remains.
items.desc_zh: 不稳定的联盟和功能失调的停火网络表明该地区仍然不稳定。

items.title_en: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的股市上涨可能是马斯克迄今为止最大的赌博
items.desc_en: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 正在为股票上市做准备，这可能会改变公司、更广泛的市场和埃隆·马斯克的财富。

items.title_en: USDA Secretary Rollins calls Texas ag chief 'unserious' amid screwworm threat
items.title_zh: 美国农业部部长罗林斯称德克萨斯州农业负责人在螺旋虫威胁中“不认真”
items.desc_en: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.
items.desc_zh: 尽管得到了特朗普的支持，但得克萨斯州农业专员西德·米勒 (Sid Miller) 在 3 月份的共和党初选中失去了第四个任期。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: Watch: Trump tells BBC Netanyahu did not defy him
items.title_zh: 观看：特朗普告诉 BBC 内塔尼亚胡并没有违抗他
items.desc_en: In a call with the US president, the BBC’s Sarah Smith asked Trump about the war in Iran and his relationship with the Israeli leader.
items.desc_zh: 在与美国总统的通话中，英国广播公司的莎拉·史密斯向特朗普询问了伊朗战争以及他与以色列领导人的关系。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Jim Cramer warns key pillars of the bull market are beginning to crumble
items.title_zh: 吉姆·克莱默警告牛市的关键支柱正在开始崩溃
items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer said that he's becoming more cautious on stocks after several pillars of his bullish outlook have come under pressure.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 表示，在他看涨前景的几个支柱受到压力后，他对股市变得更加谨慎。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 秘密提交 IPO 申请，为华尔街大型人工智能首次亮相做好准备
items.desc_en: OpenAI's confidential filing lands days before SpaceX is set to go public and a week after Anthropic announced its confidential disclosure with the SEC.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 的机密文件是在 SpaceX 上市前几天、Anthropic 向 SEC 宣布机密披露一周后提交的。

items.title_en: Apple partnering with Google and Nvidia for most advanced AI model
items.title_zh: 苹果与谷歌和英伟达合作开发最先进的人工智能模型
items.desc_en: Apple's artificial intelligence strategy took center stage at its Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, Calif.
items.desc_zh: 苹果的人工智能战略在加利福尼亚州库比蒂诺举行的全球开发者大会上成为焦点。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declines Senate testimony on AI, China and exports
items.title_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋拒绝参议院就人工智能、中国和出口问题作证
items.desc_en: Sen. Elizabeth Warren said Nvidia’s CEO should answer questions publicly as lawmakers scrutinize AI chip sales to China and export controls.
items.desc_zh: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 表示，在立法者审查对中国的人工智能芯片销售和出口管制之际，英伟达首席执行官应该公开回答问题。

items.desc_zh: 航空公司首席执行官抱怨制造商生产的发动机不够多，而且可靠性也不够。

items.title_zh: 索马里裁判阿尔坦被禁止进入美国
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was set to be the first from his country to officiate at the World Cup finals, is denied entry to the United States.
items.desc_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦原本是该国首位执法世界杯决赛的裁判，但被美国拒绝入境。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: Eriksen at home and 'doing well' after collapse
items.title_zh: 埃里克森在家并在崩溃后“表现良好”
items.desc_en: Christian Eriksen says he is "doing well" and is at home with his family following his collapse in Sunday's game against Ukraine.
items.desc_zh: 克里斯蒂安·埃里克森在周日对阵乌克兰的比赛中倒下后表示，他“状况良好”，目前正在家里与家人团聚。

items.title_en: Apple and Google given three months to ban nude images on children's devices - BBC
items.title_zh: 苹果和谷歌限时三个月禁止在儿童设备上显示裸照 - BBC

items.desc_zh: 苹果和谷歌限时三个月禁止儿童设备上出现裸照 BBCUK 的 Starmer 将在几天内宣布禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体 Bloomberg.com 儿童手机裸露法可能会基本结束
